document.title: 방송통신기자재등의 적합 인증서 / Certificate of Broadcasting and Communication Equipments
document.documentType: 적합 인증서 및 변경 신고 처리 결과 통보서
authorityOrJurisdiction: Director General of National Radio Research Agency

sourceSummary.oneLine: National Radio Research Agency conformity certificate and change-processing notice for ST60-2230C wireless LAN radio equipment.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Evidence of Korean conformity certification and notified changes for broadcasting and communication equipment.
keyPoints: Equipment name is specific low-power radio equipment for wireless access systems including wireless LAN.
Basic model is ST60-2230C with series models ST60-2230C-P and SU60-2230C.
Change notice references SDIO bus and PCIE bus technical criteria and model-name change information.

entities.name: Laird Technologies
entities.evidence: Trade Name or Applicant ... Laird Technologies

entities.name: National Radio Research Agency
entities.evidence: 국립전파연구원장 Director General of National Radio Research Agency

concepts.name: Certificate of Broadcasting and Communication Equipments

concepts.evidence: 방송통신기자재등의 적합 인증서 Certificate of Broadcasting and Communication Equipments

concepts.name: Specific low-power radio equipment for wireless access systems including wireless LAN
Radio Waves Act Article 58-2 Clause 2
concepts.evidence: It is verified that foregoing equipment has been certificated under the Clause 2, Article 58-2 of Radio Waves Act.

evidence.claim: The document is a Certificate of Broadcasting and Communication Equipments.
evidence.evidenceText: 방송통신기자재등의 적합 인증서 Certificate of Broadcasting and Communication Equipments
evidence.pageTarget: Certificate of Broadcasting and Communication Equipments

evidence.claim: The certified equipment is specific low-power radio equipment for wireless access systems including wireless LAN.
The basic model number is ST60-2230C.
The manufacturer and country of origin are Laird Technologies/United States.
The series model numbers include ST60-2230C-P and SU60-2230C.
evidence.evidenceText: 파생모델명 ST60-2230C-P, SU60-2230C Series Model Number

evidence.claim: The certification is under Clause 2, Article 58-2 of the Radio Waves Act.
evidence.evidenceText: It is verified that foregoing equipment has been certificated under the Clause 2, Article 58-2 of Radio Waves Act.

evidence.claim: A change report was processed under Article 16 of the Notice on Conformity Assessment of Broadcasting and Communication Equipment.
evidence.evidenceText: 「방송통신기자재등의 적합성평가에 관한 고시」제16조에 따른 적합성평가 사항의 변경신고 건에 대하여 위와 같이 변경처리 되었음을 알려드립니다.

evidence.claim: The change notice lists SDIO bus and PCIE bus under technical criteria.
evidence.evidenceText: 변경 전 변경 사항 변경 후 변경 전 - SDIO bus - PCIE bus 기술기준 - SDIO bus
